title: Completion Evidence
description: Validates the content of a completion-evidence artifact. Aggregates per-behavior coverage status and references review and documentation artifacts.

review-artifact.description: Artifact name referencing the review record.

documentation-artifact.description: Artifact name referencing the documentation review record.

behavior-entry.description: Coverage status for a single behavior.

behavior.description: Description of the behavior being tracked.

status.description: Coverage status: pass (tested), fail (tested, failing), or gap (not tested).

evidence-artifact.description: Artifact name referencing test evidence. Optional because gaps have no evidence.
